mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pptask_claim (task_id, device_id, device_nick_name, status, claim_time, lease_expire_time) VALUES (#{taskId}, #{deviceId}, #{deviceNickName}, #{status}, NOW(), #{leaseExpireTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM pptask_claim WHERE id = #{id} FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE pptask_claim SET status = 'FINISHED', finish_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'CLAIMED'
UPDATE pptask_claim SET status = 'FAILED', finish_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'CLAIMED'
UPDATE pptask_claim SET status = 'EXPIRED' WHERE status = 'CLAIMED' AND lease_expire_time <= NOW()
